description: Benchmark tests for strategic-commit-orchestrator skill - AI-DDD intelligent commit grouping and planning

evals.name: single-module-grouping
evals.prompt: 分析以下单模块变更并生成提交分组计划: files=[backend/src/auth/login.py, backend/src/auth/register.py, backend/tests/test_auth.py], module=backend, task_id=TASK-101

assertions.name: groups_by_concern
assertions.description: Should group auth implementation separately from tests

assertions.name: identifies_module
assertions.description: Should correctly identify the backend module

assertions.name: suggests_commit_types
assertions.description: Should suggest appropriate commit types (feat, test)

evals.name: cross-module-grouping
evals.prompt: 分析跨模块变更并生成提交分组计划: files=[backend/src/api/users.py, frontend/src/pages/UserList.tsx, shared/types/user.ts, mobile/lib/screens/user_screen.dart], task_id=TASK-202, description=user-management-feature

assertions.name: separates_modules
assertions.description: Should create separate commit groups per module

assertions.name: identifies_shared_types_first
assertions.description: Should recognize shared types as a dependency group

assertions.name: produces_multiple_groups
assertions.description: Should produce 2 or more commit groups
assertions.check: output.match(/group\s*[2-9]|Group\s*[2-9]|分组\s*[2-9]|第[二三四五]组/) || output.includes('Commit 2') || output.includes('提交 2')

evals.name: commit-message-format
evals.prompt: 为以下变更生成符合 Conventional Commits 格式的提交信息: type=feat, scope=auth, description=JWT token validation, body=Added token expiry check and refresh logic

assertions.name: subject_length_limit
assertions.description: Subject line must not exceed 50 characters

assertions.name: has_body_content
assertions.description: Should include body describing the changes

assertions.name: no_period_at_end
assertions.description: Subject line should not end with a period

evals.name: dependency-ordering
evals.prompt: 分析以下有依赖关系的变更并确定正确的提交顺序: shared/types/api.ts (基础类型), backend/src/api/handler.py (依赖 api.ts), frontend/src/api/client.ts (依赖 api.ts), backend/tests/test_handler.py (依赖 handler.py)

assertions.name: shared_types_committed_first
assertions.description: Shared types must be committed before dependent modules

assertions.name: tests_committed_last
assertions.description: Tests should be committed after implementation

assertions.name: explains_ordering_rationale
assertions.description: Should explain why this order is required
assertions.check: output.includes('依赖') || output.includes('depend') || output.includes('order') || output.includes('顺序')

evals.name: large-changeset-analysis
evals.prompt: 分析大型变更集 (22个文件) 并生成高效提交计划: files包含 backend(8), frontend(7), shared(3), tests(4), task_id=TASK-500, description=v2-api-migration

assertions.name: handles_large_changeset
assertions.description: Should successfully analyze 20+ file changes without errors

assertions.name: produces_structured_plan
assertions.description: Should produce a structured grouping plan
assertions.check: output.includes('plan') || output.includes('计划') || output.includes('Plan') || output.includes('Group') || output.includes('分组')

assertions.name: groups_not_excessive
assertions.description: Should not create excessive groups (keep manageable)

assertions.name: summarizes_total_commits
assertions.description: Should provide total commit count summary
